name: agentpage-monorepo
description: AgentPage — a static-file format + tooling that makes any website readable by LLMs/agents at 10-50x fewer tokens than raw HTML

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentpage/core && npm run build -w @agentpage/generator -w @agentpage/validator -w @agentpage/sdk
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @agentpage/core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
